summary: Subscriber and freemium boundaries are enforced server-side for APIs and app routes. Marketing pathway lessons expose a bounded preview (first section, word-clamped). Exam takeaways, memory-anchor strip, and common-traps strip are subscriber-only (fullAccess) so they are not duplicated in HTML/RSC output for locked users. Regression tests: `npm run test:paywall-surface-policy` in `nursenest-core/`.

/app/*.finding: Middleware `authorized` in `src/lib/auth-middleware.ts` requires a signed-in user for `/app`. Unauthenticated requests do not reach lesson HTML.
/app/*.robots: `src/app/(student)/app/layout.tsx` exports default `robots: { index: false, follow: false }` for the whole learner segment (covers pages without their own `generateMetadata`, e.g. `/app/lessons/[id]`).
/app/*.note: Many leaf routes also set `robots` explicitly.

/{country}/{role}/{exam}/lessons/*.finding: Marketing pathway lesson detail uses `visibleSectionsForLesson` (`src/lib/lessons/pathway-lesson-visible-sections.ts`) — locked users get first section only with ~180-word body clamp; not full lesson. Teaching supplements (ExamTakeawaysBlock, memory anchor, common traps) render only when `fullAccess` is true.
/{country}/{role}/{exam}/lessons/*.seo: `generateMetadata` sets canonical + conditional `robots` for incomplete/premium-gated catalog quality (`page.tsx` in marketing pathway lesson).

/blog/*.finding: Public marketing content by design (ISR `revalidate` on slug pages). Not a subscriber paywall surface.

/practice-tests/*.finding: Learner routes under `/app/(learner)/practice-tests/*` are behind `/app` auth; metadata uses `noindex` where defined.

findings: Marketing blog and some hubs use ISR (`revalidate`) for public SEO — expected.
Pathway marketing lesson detail is `dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` (no static snapshot of per-user HTML). Removed redundant `revalidate = 86400` from that page to avoid implying ISR.
fixes: Production `next.config.ts` `headers()` adds `Cache-Control: private, no-store, must-revalidate` for `/app/:path*` to discourage shared edge/CDN caching of authenticated HTML.

directLinkSharing.appLessonDetail: `/app/lessons/[id]` requires session (middleware); without subscription, page returns paywall UI before loading full `contentItem` / pathway body (`lessons/[id]/page.tsx`).
directLinkSharing.marketingLesson: Signed-out visitors see preview-only sections only; full access uses `canViewFullPathwayLesson` + pathway match.

GET /api/lessons.bodyFields: List responses select `id`, `slug`, `title`, `summary` only — no `content` JSON (`api/lessons/route.ts`).

GET /api/questions/[id].subscriber: Rationale only when entitled + `includeRationale`; otherwise preview fields

apiDataLeak.residual: New API routes must repeat: session → entitlement → minimal `select` — audit any future public GET that touches `contentItem.content` or full question rows.

previewContent.pathwayMarketing: First section only + word clamp for locked users (`pathway-lesson-visible-sections.ts`).
previewContent.relatedQuestions: Marketing lesson surfaces truncated `stemPreview` (~155 chars), not options/rationales (`lesson-question-cross-links.ts`).

staticBuildSafety.app: `dynamic = force-dynamic` on app layouts; pathway marketing lesson uses `force-dynamic` + `dynamicParams`.

fixesAppliedThisAudit: Default `metadata.robots` noindex/nofollow on `src/app/(student)/app/layout.tsx` for entire `/app` tree.
Removed misleading `revalidate` export from marketing pathway lesson detail page (keeps `force-dynamic` as single source of truth).
Gated `ExamTakeawaysBlock`, `PathwayLessonMemoryAnchorStrip`, and `PathwayLessonCommonTrapsStrip` behind `fullAccess` on marketing pathway lesson detail (`.../lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx`).
recommendedFollowUps: Periodic grep for `select: {[^}]*content: true` on non-admin API routes.
Optional: `X-Robots-Tag: noindex` header for `/app` via same `headers()` block if search engines ignore meta in edge cases (usually unnecessary with middleware + meta).
Load testing: confirm CDN respects `private, no-store` on your host (Vercel/DO).

successCriteria.zeroSubscriberLessonBodyViaGoogleForAppR: EXPECTED — bots lack session; `/app` noindex by default
successCriteria.zeroFullLessonInMarketingWithoutEntitlem: EXPECTED — preview-only SSR for locked pathway lessons
